blockers.title: Guardian consent proof is incomplete
blockers.evidence: The vault requires recording guardian name/email, consent action, date, and policy version (`01 Under-18 Launch Copy (Drafts).md`, "What we record"). `convex/schema.ts:169-183` has no guardian consent policy-version or confirmed-at field, and `convex/guardians.ts:256` only patches `confirmation_state: "confirmed"`.
blockers.required_fix: Persist the guardian consent confirmation timestamp and policy/version agreed to, and cover it with Convex tests.

blockers.title: Resend flow can report success without sending and misses audit refusals
blockers.evidence: `resendGuardianEmail` returns `{ ok: true }` immediately after scheduling `sendGuardianEmail` (`convex/guardians.ts:166-169`), so the UI says "Sent" before delivery. Global cap refusal returns silently without audit (`convex/guardians.ts:67-69`, `111-112`). Resend failure throws after token rotation/audit (`convex/guardians.ts:74-86`, `114-123`), leaving a rotated token and misleading audit with no delivered email.
blockers.required_fix: Make resend success reflect an actual queued/sent outcome, audit every refusal/failure path, and avoid consuming member throttle or rotating/invalidation side effects for unsent emails.

blockers.title: Token lookup violates the neutral used-token requirement
blockers.evidence: Spec criterion 2 says invalid, expired, and used tokens render the same neutral state. `lookupGuardianToken` returns `already_confirmed` for confirmed tokens (`convex/guardians.ts:193-194`). Expired lookup returns `invalid` without persisting `confirmation_state = "expired"` (`convex/guardians.ts:196-201`); only the confirm mutation marks expiry (`convex/guardians.ts:246-248`).
blockers.required_fix: Keep GET/lookup neutral for used tokens; reserve friendly already-done only for an explicit repeat mutation. Persist expiry through a write path or scheduled expiry mechanism.

non_blocking_notes: Focused Vitest could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vite tried to write `node_modules/.vite-temp/...`.
No em dashes found in added member-facing strings; the only em dash in the diff is a test assertion.

spec_compliance.criterion: AC1 guardian email sent at the right moment
spec_compliance.evidence: Auth schedules the action, but delivery/refusal can silently fail and the member-facing state still says the email was sent.
Button mutation exists and lookup does not confirm, but used-token lookup is not neutral and expiry is not persisted on lookup.

spec_compliance.criterion: AC3 confirmation activates member, certificate, audit
spec_compliance.evidence: Lifecycle/cert/audit are present, but the required guardian consent proof lacks confirmation date and policy version.
Per-member throttles exist, but global refusal and Resend failure are not surfaced/audited correctly and can burn throttle/token state without a sent email.
Active minor branch renders certificate plus AFG signpost and bypasses adult tiles/settings in `src/portal/Dashboard.tsx:134-205`.
No em dashes, but rendered JSX introduces non-verbatim punctuation spacing around commas in the AFG copy (`src/portal/Dashboard.tsx:159-162`, `176-179`).
No at-18 graduation, event/photo reconfirmation, revocation portal, or admin queue was added.

Tests cover the happy path, expiry on confirm, idempotency, and local resend throttle, but not global cap refusal, Resend failure, policy-version recording, used-token lookup neutrality, or the spec's invalid-token E2E state.

summary: The slice implements much of the flow, but it is not shippable for a minors consent gate: the legal consent proof is incomplete, resend/audit semantics can mislead families and operators, and token lookup does not meet the no-enumeration requirement.
